title: grok-security.yaml
description: Official JSON Schema for grok-security.yaml — defines real-time security and compliance scans, PR blocking rules, and multi-channel notifications. Compatible with grok-install.yaml@1.0+ and grok@2026.4+.

version.description: Semantic version of this security configuration file.

author.description: X handle of the security config owner, prefixed with '@'.

compatibility.description: Platform specs this file is tested and compatible with.

security.description: Top-level security configuration containing scan definitions and global notification settings.

scans.description: Named scan definitions. Each key is the scan identifier used in '@grok security scan:<Name>' triggers.

type.description: Category of security check to perform.

files.description: Glob patterns selecting files in scope for this scan. Defaults to all files ('**/*') when omitted.

exclude_files.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude from scan scope.

alert_level.description: Minimum severity at which this scan raises an alert.

frequency.description: How often this scan runs automatically.

severity_threshold.description: CVSS score or severity band below which findings are suppressed.

fail_on_finding.description: Mark this scan as failed when any finding meets or exceeds the alert_level.

auto_block_prs.description: Automatically block PR merges when any critical-level scan finding is detected.

notify_on_slack.description: Send Slack notifications when scans detect findings at or above the configured alert_level.

notify_on_x.description: Post X (Twitter) notifications when scans detect findings at or above the configured alert_level.

notify_email.description: Email address to notify on critical findings. Must be a valid email format.

compliance_standards.description: Compliance frameworks to validate against during license_gdpr and related scans.

allowed_licenses.description: SPDX license identifiers approved for use in this repository's dependencies.
